description: Sync Okta users, groups, applications, and system log events into the Shielva knowledge base via the Okta REST API v1.

install_fields.label: API Token
install_fields.help: Okta API token. From Okta Admin Console: Security → API → Tokens → Create Token.

install_fields.label: Okta Domain (e.g. dev-123456.okta.com)
install_fields.help: Your Okta organization domain. Find it in the Okta Admin Console URL bar or under Settings → Account.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate api_token and domain by calling GET /users/me. Returns HEALTHY + CONNECTED on success.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /users/me and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE. Includes authenticated login.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of Okta users, groups, applications, and system log events into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Users
methods.description: List all users via cursor pagination.

methods.name: Get User
methods.description: Retrieve a single user by Okta user ID.

methods.name: List Groups
methods.description: List all groups via cursor pagination.

methods.name: List Applications
methods.description: List all applications via cursor pagination.

methods.name: List System Logs
methods.description: List system log events via cursor pagination. Supports since= for incremental fetches.
